de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class TacletAppIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletAppIndex

  • public class TacletAppIndex
extends Object
    the class manages the available TacletApps. This index has to be used if one wants to ask for the available taclet application at a specific position (or the whole sequent if taclet is a nofind rule). This means all taclet applications that have a position information are managed by this index. For all others the class TacletIndex is used. This index uses also the TacletIndex to calculate new TacletApps.

      Filter that is used to restrict the set of taclets that are considered as possible members of this index.

      The sequent with the formulas for which taclet indices are hold by this object.

      private TacletIndex tacletIndex

    • Field Detail

      • tacletIndex

        private final TacletIndex tacletIndex

      • antecIndex

        private SemisequentTacletAppIndex antecIndex

      • succIndex

        private SemisequentTacletAppIndex succIndex

      • indexCaches

        private TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet indexCaches

      • goal

        private Goal goal

      • newRuleListener

        private NewRuleListener newRuleListener
        Object to which the appearance of new taclet apps is reported

      • ruleFilter

        private RuleFilter ruleFilter
        Filter that is used to restrict the set of taclets that are considered as possible members of this index. This is used to distinguish between TacletAppIndex s exclusively for automatic or interactive taclets.

      • seq

        private Sequent seq
        The sequent with the formulas for which taclet indices are hold by this object. Invariant: seq != null implies that the indices antecIndex, succIndex are up to date for the sequent seq

      • cache

        private Map<PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl.CacheKey,TermTacletAppIndex> cache

    • Method Detail

      • setNewRuleListener

        public void setNewRuleListener(NewRuleListener p_newRuleListener)

      • copyWithTacletIndex

        TacletAppIndex copyWithTacletIndex(TacletIndex p_tacletIndex)
        returns a new TacletAppIndex with a given TacletIndex

      • setup

        public void setup(Goal p_goal)
        Set the goal association of this index to the given object p_goal. If the sequent of the new goal differs from the former one (attribute seq), the index will be rebuilt as soon as data is requested from it.

      • clearAndDetachCache

        public void clearAndDetachCache()
        Delete all cached information about taclet apps. This also makes the index cache of this index independent from the caches of other indexes (expensive)

      • clearIndexes

        public void clearIndexes()

      • createNewIndexCache

        private void createNewIndexCache()

      • fillCache

        public void fillCache()
        Forces all delayed computations to be performed, so that the cache is fully up-to-date (NewRuleListener gets informed)

      • createAllFromGoal

        private void createAllFromGoal()

      • ensureIndicesExist

        private void ensureIndicesExist()

      • isUpToDateForGoal

        private boolean isUpToDateForGoal()
        Returns:
        true iff this index currently is up to date with respect to the sequent of the associated goal; this does not detect other modifications like an altered user constraint

        private SemisequentTacletAppIndex getIndex(PosInOccurrence pos)

                                        PosInOccurrence pos,
                                        Services services)
        creates TacletApps out of each single NoPosTacletApp object
        Parameters:

        pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus

        list of all created TacletApps

      • getNoFindTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getNoFindTaclet(TacletFilter filter,
                                            Services services)
        collects all NoFindTacletInstantiations
        Parameters:
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • getRewriteTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getRewriteTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                             TacletFilter filter,
                                             TermServices services)
        collects all RewriteTacletInstantiations in a subterm of the constrainedFormula described by a PosInOccurrence. RewriteTaclets with wrong prefix are filtered out.
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • getFindTaclet

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getFindTaclet(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                          TacletFilter filter,
                                          TermServices services)
        collects all FindTaclets with instantiations and position
        Parameters:
        pos - the PosInOccurrence to focus
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        list of all possible instantiations

      • getTacletAppAtAndBelow

        public ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAtAndBelow(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                              TacletFilter filter,
                                              Services services)
        returns the rule applications at the given PosInOccurrence and at all Positions below this. The method calls getTacletAppAt for all the Positions below.
        Parameters:
        pos - the position where to start from
        services - the Services object encapsulating information about the java datastructures like (static)types etc.
        Returns:
        the possible rule applications

        public void sequentChanged(Goal goal,
                  SequentChangeInfo sci)
        called if a formula has been replaced
        Parameters:
        sci - SequentChangeInfo describing the change of the sequent

      • reportRuleApps

        public void reportRuleApps(NewRuleListener l,
                  Services services)
        Reports all cached rule apps. Calls ruleAdded on the given NewRuleListener for every cached taclet app.
